objective.paragraph: A manufacturer of professional cleaning and sanitation products sought to expand market presence across Turkey's hospitality sector. The goal was to establish supply agreements with hotels and resort properties by booking meetings with decision-makers responsible for procurement and facility maintenance.
objective.one_liner: Hotels across Turkey to book meetings with procurement and housekeeping managers for cleaning supplies supply agreements.

target_profile.geography: Turkey nationwide (Istanbul, Ankara, Antalya, Izmir, Cappadocia, coastal resorts)

sequence.step_01: Target: Verified hotel list created with addresses and contact information for major Turkish hospitality properties
sequence.step_02: Identify: Decision-maker roles mapped including procurement, housekeeping, and operations departments
sequence.step_03: Expose: Multi-channel visibility launched with role-focused messaging on LinkedIn and location-targeted Google Ads
sequence.step_04: Engage: High-intent outreach initiated via email templates and phone scripts for properties showing engagement signals
sequence.step_05: Meet: Confirmed meetings booked with verified decision-makers from target roles

outputs.locations_targeted: Istanbul, Ankara, Antalya, Izmir, Cappadocia, coastal resort areas
outputs.campaigns_launched: LinkedIn role-targeted campaigns, Google Ads location-focused, Meta/Instagram hospitality interest targeting

analysis_result.notes: Strong performance in resort areas during peak season. Procurement managers showed highest engagement rates.
